prompt: A hyper-realistic, surrealist wide-angle photograph taken at twilight. The scene is a vast, smooth, desolate salt flat. In the center, a solitary human figure with no distinct features is completely motionless. They are suspended five feet off the ground, supported only by dozens of fine, taut, glowing, silver cables that radiate outward like a web to several other much larger, complex, architectural-scale clusters of figures. Each of these connected clusters is composed of hundreds of interlocking people, forming massive, self-sustaining human pyramids and networks. These clusters have exponentially more connections and complexity than the single central figure, which looks simple and isolated. The central figure is dependent on the massively larger networks. A sense of overwhelming scale and undeniable, systematic hierarchy is present. Natural, soft light, deep textures of salt and skin.
visual_logic: A solitary figure is physically supported by connections to vastly larger, complex human networks; visually, the few connections of the central point are dependent on and overwhelmed by the massive popularity of the average connection.
